semantic.role: CLI command adapter for the 'fix' operation, providing a thin interface to delegate execution to the runtime service's fix subsystem facade.
responsibilities: Defines the ExecuteFixCommandOptions interface, requiring a RuntimeService instance for dependency injection.
Logs experimental warnings to the console about the generative nature of the fix feature.
Executes the fix command by invoking runtimeService.getFixService().run() and awaits the result.
Throws an ArchSpineError with code CliCommandFailed if the fix operation reports any remaining architectural violations.
outOfScope: Implementing the fix logic or pipeline (delegated to runtime service).
Providing user input parsing or CLI argument validation (assumed upstream).
invariants: Must remain a thin adapter, delegating all business logic to the runtime service.
Must not absorb pipeline, engine, or persistence responsibilities.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Separate CLI command routing from core fix logic to maintain testability and reuse.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Tighten schema handling and add try preview (based on git intent, though not directly evidenced in this file's current code).
